title: Background Nether
description: Adds a custom background featuring the fiery landscapes of the Nether.
body:
# Background Nether
Background Nether adds a custom Minecraft background featuring the fiery, atmospheric landscapes of the Nether. It brings the intense feel of the Nether to your game’s menu, setting the tone for your adventure.

![Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6a93c713dd8b482ce787ee4823595401f99b32f1_0.webp)
